service.name: Planet Labs API
service.description_for_ai: Daily satellite imagery of the entire Earth. 3-5m resolution, updated daily. Used for agriculture monitoring, deforestation tracking, disaster response. Commercial service with free education tier.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://www.planet.com/explorer/ — free education/research access available
auth.cost: Free education tier. Commercial from custom pricing

capabilities.description_for_ai: Daily satellite imagery of the entire Earth. 3-5m resolution, updated daily. Used for agriculture monitoring, deforestation tracking, disaster response. Commercial service with free education tier. Search for satellite scenes by location, date, and cloud cover. Returns available imagery for an area.

filter.description: {type: AndFilter, config: [DateRangeFilter, GeometryFilter, RangeFilter for cloud_cover]}
filter.note: See description for full object structure

agent_hints.free_tier: Education and research accounts get free access. Apply at https://www.planet.com/markets/education-and-research/
agent_hints.cloud_cover: Filter cloud_cover lte 0.1 for 10% or less cloud cover for usable imagery.
